description: Your body weight tracker in wger has three erroneous entries that were accidentally entered in pounds instead of kilograms. Log in to wger (username: admin, password: adminadmin) at http://localhost/en/user/login and delete all three entries with values above 150 kg from the body weight history. These entries (approximately 191.8 kg, 190.5 kg, and 192.3 kg) may be located on older pages of the history list. Firefox is already open to the login page.
